layman_headline: Fear grips the crypto market — no clean setups worth risking money on right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in a fearful state with most altcoins in downtrends and Bitcoin dominating the money flow. Every candidate on the watchlist has bearish chart structures — prices are below their key moving averages and selling pressure is still strong. While a few coins like BONK are getting close to oversold territory, they're still falling hard with no signs of a bottom forming yet. The smartest move right now is to wait for clearer reversal signals before putting money to work.
layman_action: Stay patient and keep cash ready. Wait for oversold coins to actually show a bounce with volume confirmation before entering. There's no rush — catching a falling knife in this environment is the biggest risk.
expert_reasoning: Every swing candidate presents a conflicting picture: either deeply bearish charts (BONK at -2.0 bias with Three Black Crows), overbought after a surge (DEXE RSI 71, LDO already +17% in 7d with 0.38x risk/reward), or neutral with no catalyst (SUN, PENGU, KITE). ETH has the most compelling case with RSI at 39 (our highest-confidence signal historically at 80% win rate), but the bearish chart structure (-0.7 bias), price below all MAs, and BTC dominance at 56.4% crushing alt flows make this a poor risk/reward entry point. The CryptoSlate headline about a potential 18% BTC drop to $52,900 adds macro downside risk. I'd rather wait for ETH to test the $1,800 support level cleanly and show a bullish reversal candle before committing capital.
risk_factors: CryptoSlate flags potential 18% BTC decline to $52,900 which would drag all alts significantly lower
BTC dominance at 56.4% means capital is flowing away from altcoins — unfavorable environment for alt swing trades
Fear & Greed at 28 with flat trend suggests no sentiment inflection point yet — could get worse before it gets better
watch_list: ETH behavior at $1,800 support — a strong bounce with volume here would be a high-quality entry signal
Fear & Greed index movement — a spike above 35 could signal the beginning of a sentiment reversal
BTC price action around $64,000 — if it breaks lower toward $60K, all alt setups are invalidated
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear-driven consolidation with BTC at $64,452 and dominance at 56.4%, squeezing altcoin valuations. Most altcoins are in structural downtrends below key moving averages, and no clear reversal signals have emerged yet.
context_banner: Fear-driven market with universally bearish alt charts demands patience — capital preservation is the priority until reversal signals materialize.

key_signals.description: ETH RSI at 39 is approaching oversold but hasn't reached the 30 level that historically produces 80% win-rate bounce trades — premature to enter.
Bitcoin sellers tiring but weak demand leaves 18% downside to $52,900 in play — significant macro risk for any long position.
Fear & Greed at 28 with flat weekly trend (25.7 avg) shows no sentiment recovery yet — waiting for inflection above 35.
All swing candidates show bearish chart structures (-0.7 to -2.0 bias scores) except LDO (+0.85) and DEXE (+0.4), both already extended with poor risk/reward ratios.
ETH derivatives reset noted by Blockworks could set up a cleaner long entry once positioning clears, but the reset isn't complete yet.
